home.title: FrontEnd
home.sub: I build modern web interfaces that work fast, look clean, and users love.
home.introText: Frontend developer. I build responsive websites and SPAs with Vue.js — from first mockup to deploy. I care about details: typography, interface responsiveness, accessibility. Open to interesting projects.

skills.title: My skills
skills.intro: I build responsive web interfaces that work equally well on desktop, tablet, and smartphone. I write clean, maintainable code and follow industry best practices.
skills.techHtmlcss: semantic markup, Flexbox, Grid, animations, media queries, CSS variables.
skills.techJs: ES6+, DOM manipulation, async, Fetch API.
skills.techVue: components, Composition API, Vue Router, reactivity.
skills.approachText: An analytical mindset helps me break down complex tasks and find optimal solutions. Every project is a chance to learn something new and step beyond the familiar.

velo.title: Dobry Lis Cycling Club
velo.desc1: Interactive Instagram page for the Dobry Lis cycling club. Visual content, unified post and stories style, navigation by sections.
velo.desc2: Working with the club's designers and content managers gave me an understanding of how visual identity shapes a community around a brand.

flexy.title: FLEX Mobile App
flexy.desc1: Mobile app for the Flexy Team. Interface design, responsive screen layouts, working with the UI-kit.
flexy.desc2: The app brings together a team toolkit — from task management to communication. Focus on navigation, clean visuals, and responsive interface.
flexy.f3: Unified design language across the app

template.title: Simple Starter Template
template.desc1: Starter template for web projects — the foundation for all future work. Semantic HTML, responsive CSS, fonts and icons setup.
template.desc2: This project was the starting point: first experience with Git, understanding the workflow, and team collaboration skills.

cheese.title: Cheese Factory
cheese.desc1: Concept for a craft cheese factory website — a chance to convey the story and atmosphere of true craftsmanship through design.
cheese.desc2: Product catalog with photos, recipes section, story of the production process — from ingredient selection to traditional aging methods.
cheese.f2: Story and craft in every section
